case_title: CATHERINE MOORE VS. MARIA LIN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-16-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-16-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-02-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
